message:
fix: add proper error handling to mail commands that silently swallowed failures (gt-mhaiq)

- mail_send.go: use style.PrintWarning for thread lookup failures instead of raw stderr
- mail_inbox.go: propagate Count() error instead of discarding with _
- mail_queue.go: log releaseQueueMessage error on lost claim race instead of discarding
- mail_check.go: log errors to stderr in inject mode instead of silently returning nil
- mail_check.go: handle ListUnread error in inject mode instead of discarding with _
